hypothesis: A coupled ensemble consisting of four heterogeneous molecular graph models (e.g., PaiNN, SchNet, GIN, and GatedGCN) trained with the ensemble-consensus semi-supervised objective using 10% labeled QM9 and 90% unlabeled ZINC will achieve a statistically significant lower QM9 test MAE and lower expected calibration error than a same‑sized coupled ensemble of four homogeneous PaiNN models trained under identical settings.
